Removed_Other.purpose: Improves user experience by showing more content at once.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagAXExpandPeekViewOnFirstScrollExposureLogging_IXP
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enhances the logging of user interactions when scrolling, particularly for first-time views.
Removed_Other.purpose: Players benefit from improved tracking of how they interact with content, leading to better updates and features.
